```{r withinpair_uni_forest_helpers}
  # Dynamic x-axis limits with sensible defaults and breathing room
  base_min <- 0.25
  base_max <- 3
  hard_min <- 0.05
  hard_max <- 10

  if (nrow(forest_data) > 0) {
    hr_min <- suppressWarnings(min(forest_data$hr_lower, na.rm = TRUE))
    hr_max <- suppressWarnings(max(forest_data$hr_upper, na.rm = TRUE))

    if (!is.finite(hr_min)) hr_min <- base_min
    if (!is.finite(hr_max)) hr_max <- base_max

    hr_min <- max(hr_min, 0.001)

    lower_margin_factor <- 0.9
    upper_margin_factor <- 1.1

    x_min <- min(base_min, hr_min * lower_margin_factor)
    x_max <- max(base_max, hr_max * upper_margin_factor)

    x_min <- max(hard_min, x_min)
    x_max <- min(hard_max, x_max)
  } else {
    x_min <- base_min
    x_max <- base_max
  }

  x_breaks <- pretty(c(x_min, x_max), n = 6)
  x_breaks <- x_breaks[x_breaks >= x_min & x_breaks <= x_max]

  # Add formatted HR column and detect if scientific notation is needed
  forest_data <- forest_data |>
    mutate(
      use_sci = pmax(abs(hr), abs(hr_lower), abs(hr_upper), na.rm = TRUE) >= 10,
      hr_formatted = if_else(
        use_sci,
        sprintf("%.1e (%.1e-%.1e)", hr, hr_lower, hr_upper),
        sprintf("%.2f (%.2f-%.2f)", hr, hr_lower, hr_upper)
      )
    )

  # Detect if we need wider table for scientific notation
  has_sci_notation <- any(forest_data$use_sci)
  table_width_ratio <- if (has_sci_notation) 3.2 else 2.5

  tab <- forest_data |>
    transmute(y_pos, `Organ age` = Organ_Display, `HR (95% CI)` = hr_formatted, `FDR` = sprintf("%.2e", p_value))

  x_pos <- tibble(col = c("Organ age", "HR (95% CI)", "FDR"), x = c(1.0, 4.0, 7.5))
  table_long <- tab |>
    pivot_longer(-y_pos, names_to = "col", values_to = "val") |>
    left_join(x_pos, by = "col")

  p_table <- ggplot(table_long, aes(x = x, y = y_pos, label = val)) +
    geom_text(hjust = c(0, 0, 1)[match(table_long$col, x_pos$col)], size = 3) +
    geom_text(data = x_pos |> mutate(y_pos = max(forest_data$y_pos) + 1), aes(x = x, y = y_pos, label = col), hjust = c(0, 0, 1), fontface = "bold", inherit.aes = FALSE, size = 3.3) +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = NULL, labels = NULL, limits = c(0.5, max(forest_data$y_pos) + 1.5)) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0.5, 9.0), expand = c(0, 0)) +
    labs(title = title) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.1, size = 12), axis.title = element_blank(), axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.ticks = element_blank(), panel.grid = element_blank(), plot.margin = unit(c(12, 6, 6, 6), "pt"))

  # Determine which points are out of bounds (based on HR only) and cap CIs to plot range
  forest_data <- forest_data |>
    mutate(
      out_of_bounds_point = hr < x_min | hr > x_max,
      hr_lower_capped = pmax(hr_lower, x_min),
      hr_upper_capped = pmin(hr_upper, x_max),
      has_any_value_outside = (hr < x_min | hr > x_max | hr_lower < x_min | hr_upper > x_max)
    )

  # Only plot data where the HR itself is within bounds
  data_in_bounds <- forest_data |> filter(!out_of_bounds_point)

  # Calculate legend position (only significant legend in this version, nudged slightly)
  legend_y <- max(forest_data$y_pos) + 1.5
  legend_left_x <- x_min + (x_max - x_min) * 0.04
  legend_bottom_y <- 0.25
  legend_bottom_x <- x_min + (x_max - x_min) * 0.60

  p_forest <- ggplot(forest_data, aes(y = y_pos)) +
    geom_rect(aes(xmin = -Inf, xmax = Inf, ymin = y_pos - 0.5, ymax = y_pos + 0.5, fill = factor(seq_along(Organ) %% 2)), alpha = 0.6, show.legend = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("0" = "transparent", "1" = "gray95")) +
    geom_segment(aes(x = 1, xend = 1, y = 0.5, yend = max(forest_data$y_pos) + 0.75), linetype = "33", color = "grey10", size = 0.7) +
    {if (nrow(data_in_bounds) > 0) geom_errorbarh(data = data_in_bounds, aes(xmin = hr_lower_capped, xmax = hr_upper_capped), color = data_in_bounds$errorbar_color, height = 0.15, size = 0.6)} +
    {if (nrow(data_in_bounds) > 0) geom_point(data = data_in_bounds, aes(x = hr, color = significant), size = 2.5, shape = 16)} +
    {if (nrow(data_in_bounds |> filter(has_any_value_outside)) > 0) geom_text(data = data_in_bounds |> filter(has_any_value_outside), aes(x = hr, y = y_pos + 0.25), label = "*", size = 3.5, color = "black")} +
    annotate("text", x = legend_left_x, y = legend_y, label = "● Significant (FDR < 0.05)", hjust = 0, size = 2.6, color = main_color) +
    {if (nrow(data_in_bounds |> filter(has_any_value_outside)) > 0) annotate("text", x = legend_bottom_x, y = legend_bottom_y, label = "* Value outside plot range", hjust = 1, size = 2.4, color = "black")} +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("TRUE" = main_color, "FALSE" = "gray80")) +
    scale_x_continuous(
      limits = c(x_min, x_max),
      breaks = x_breaks,
      labels = format(x_breaks, digits = 3, trim = TRUE)
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(breaks = NULL, labels = NULL, limits = c(0.2, max(forest_data$y_pos) + 1.5)) +
    labs(x = "Hazard Ratio (95% CI)", y = NULL) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(axis.text.y = element_blank(), axis.text.x = element_text(size = 9), axis.title.x = element_text(size = 10), panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(), panel.grid.minor = element_blank(), panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(), plot.margin = unit(c(12, 12, 6, 0), "pt"), legend.position = "none") +
    coord_cartesian(clip = "off")

  p_table + p_forest + plot_layout(widths = c(table_width_ratio, 1.5))
}
```

```{r withinpair_uni_forest_plots}
# Create directories for within-pair forest tables
dir.create(file.path(output_core_dir, "forest_table", "within_pair"), showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# All pairs forest plots
if (exists("wp_uni_all") && nrow(wp_uni_all) > 0) {
  wp_uni_all_disease_plots <- list()
  for (disease_name in names(diseases_with_mortality_healthspan)) {
    disease_data <- wp_uni_all |> filter(Model_Type == "WithinPair_All", Disease == disease_name)
    if (nrow(disease_data) == 0) next
    plot <- create_forest_table_combined_wp_uni(wp_uni_all, disease_name = disease_name, model_type = "WithinPair_All", main_color = "black")
    wp_uni_all_disease_plots[[diseases_with_mortality_healthspan[[disease_name]]$name]] <- plot
  }
  
  # Save all pairs forest plots
  for (disease_display in names(wp_uni_all_disease_plots)) {
    filename <- paste0(tolower(str_replace_all(disease_display, " ", "_")), "_all_pairs.svg")
    filename <- str_replace(filename, "^end_of_healthspan_", "healthspan_")
    ggsave(filename = filename, plot = wp_uni_all_disease_plots[[disease_display]], path = file.path(output_core_dir, "forest_table", "within_pair"), device = "svg", width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300)
  }
}

# MZ twins forest plots
if (exists("wp_uni_mz") && nrow(wp_uni_mz) > 0) {
  wp_uni_mz_disease_plots <- list()
  for (disease_name in names(diseases_with_mortality_healthspan)) {
    disease_data <- wp_uni_mz |> filter(Model_Type == "WithinPair_MZ", Disease == disease_name)
    if (nrow(disease_data) == 0) next
    plot <- create_forest_table_combined_wp_uni(wp_uni_mz, disease_name = disease_name, model_type = "WithinPair_MZ", main_color = "black")
    wp_uni_mz_disease_plots[[diseases_with_mortality_healthspan[[disease_name]]$name]] <- plot
  }
  
  # Save MZ twins forest plots
  for (disease_display in names(wp_uni_mz_disease_plots)) {
    filename <- paste0(tolower(str_replace_all(disease_display, " ", "_")), "_mz_twins.svg")
    filename <- str_replace(filename, "^end_of_healthspan_", "healthspan_")
    ggsave(filename = filename, plot = wp_uni_mz_disease_plots[[disease_display]], path = file.path(output_core_dir, "forest_table", "within_pair"), device = "svg", width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300)
  }
}

# DZ twins forest plots
if (exists("wp_uni_dz") && nrow(wp_uni_dz) > 0) {
  wp_uni_dz_disease_plots <- list()
  for (disease_name in names(diseases_with_mortality_healthspan)) {
    disease_data <- wp_uni_dz |> filter(Model_Type == "WithinPair_DZ", Disease == disease_name)
    if (nrow(disease_data) == 0) next
    plot <- create_forest_table_combined_wp_uni(wp_uni_dz, disease_name = disease_name, model_type = "WithinPair_DZ", main_color = "black")
    wp_uni_dz_disease_plots[[diseases_with_mortality_healthspan[[disease_name]]$name]] <- plot
  }
  
  # Save DZ twins forest plots
  for (disease_display in names(wp_uni_dz_disease_plots)) {
    filename <- paste0(tolower(str_replace_all(disease_display, " ", "_")), "_dz_twins.svg")
    filename <- str_replace(filename, "^end_of_healthspan_", "healthspan_")
    ggsave(filename = filename, plot = wp_uni_dz_disease_plots[[disease_display]], path = file.path(output_core_dir, "forest_table", "within_pair"), device = "svg", width = 8, height = 5, dpi = 300)
  }
}

# Create tables directory
dir.create(file.path(output_core_dir, "tables", "within_pair"), showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# Save table data as CSV - All pairs
if (exists("wp_uni_all") && nrow(wp_uni_all) > 0) {
  for (disease_name in names(diseases_with_mortality_healthspan)) {
    disease_data <- wp_uni_all |> filter(Model_Type == "WithinPair_All", Disease == disease_name)
    if (nrow(disease_data) == 0) next
    
    # Create table data
    tab <- disease_data |>
      mutate(
        use_sci = pmax(abs(HR), abs(HR_lower), abs(HR_upper), na.rm = TRUE) >= 10,
        hr_formatted = if_else(use_sci,
          sprintf("%.1e (%.1e-%.1e)", HR, HR_lower, HR_upper),
          sprintf("%.2f (%.2f-%.2f)", HR, HR_lower, HR_upper)),
        Organ_Display = case_when(
          Organ == "Gastrointestinal_tract" ~ "Gastrointestinal",
          Organ == "Kidney_urinary" ~ "Kidney and Bladder",
          Organ == "Artery" ~ "Arterial",
          TRUE ~ str_to_title(Organ)
        )
      ) |>
      select(Organ = Organ_Display, `HR (95% CI)` = hr_formatted, FDR = P_value_FDR)
    
    # Save CSV
    display_name <- diseases_with_mortality_healthspan[[disease_name]]$name
    filename <- paste0(tolower(str_replace_all(display_name, " ", "_")), "_all_pairs.csv")
    filename <- str_replace(filename, "^end_of_healthspan_", "healthspan_")
    write.csv(tab, file = file.path(output_core_dir, "tables", "within_pair", filename), row.names = FALSE)
  }
}

# Save table data as CSV - MZ twins
if (exists("wp_uni_mz") && nrow(wp_uni_mz) > 0) {
  for (disease_name in names(diseases_with_mortality_healthspan)) {
    disease_data <- wp_uni_mz |> filter(Model_Type == "WithinPair_MZ", Disease == disease_name)
    if (nrow(disease_data) == 0) next
    
    # Create table data
    tab <- disease_data |>
      mutate(
        use_sci = pmax(abs(HR), abs(HR_lower), abs(HR_upper), na.rm = TRUE) >= 10,
        hr_formatted = if_else(use_sci,
          sprintf("%.1e (%.1e-%.1e)", HR, HR_lower, HR_upper),
          sprintf("%.2f (%.2f-%.2f)", HR, HR_lower, HR_upper)),
        Organ_Display = case_when(
          Organ == "Gastrointestinal_tract" ~ "Gastrointestinal",
          Organ == "Kidney_urinary" ~ "Kidney and Bladder",
          Organ == "Artery" ~ "Arterial",
          TRUE ~ str_to_title(Organ)
        )
      ) |>
      select(Organ = Organ_Display, `HR (95% CI)` = hr_formatted, FDR = P_value_FDR)
    
    # Save CSV
    display_name <- diseases_with_mortality_healthspan[[disease_name]]$name
    filename <- paste0(tolower(str_replace_all(display_name, " ", "_")), "_mz_twins.csv")
    filename <- str_replace(filename, "^end_of_healthspan_", "healthspan_")
    write.csv(tab, file = file.path(output_core_dir, "tables", "within_pair", filename), row.names = FALSE)
  }
}

# Save table data as CSV - DZ twins
if (exists("wp_uni_dz") && nrow(wp_uni_dz) > 0) {
  for (disease_name in names(diseases_with_mortality_healthspan)) {
    disease_data <- wp_uni_dz |> filter(Model_Type == "WithinPair_DZ", Disease == disease_name)
    if (nrow(disease_data) == 0) next
    
    # Create table data
    tab <- disease_data |>
      mutate(
        use_sci = pmax(abs(HR), abs(HR_lower), abs(HR_upper), na.rm = TRUE) >= 10,
        hr_formatted = if_else(use_sci,
          sprintf("%.1e (%.1e-%.1e)", HR, HR_lower, HR_upper),
          sprintf("%.2f (%.2f-%.2f)", HR, HR_lower, HR_upper)),
        Organ_Display = case_when(
          Organ == "Gastrointestinal_tract" ~ "Gastrointestinal",
          Organ == "Kidney_urinary" ~ "Kidney and Bladder",
          Organ == "Artery" ~ "Arterial",
          TRUE ~ str_to_title(Organ)
        )
      ) |>
      select(Organ = Organ_Display, `HR (95% CI)` = hr_formatted, FDR = P_value_FDR)
    
    # Save CSV
    display_name <- diseases_with_mortality_healthspan[[disease_name]]$name
    filename <- paste0(tolower(str_replace_all(display_name, " ", "_")), "_dz_twins.csv")
    filename <- str_replace(filename, "^end_of_healthspan_", "healthspan_")
    write.csv(tab, file = file.path(output_core_dir, "tables", "within_pair", filename), row.names = FALSE)
  }
}
```

```{r withinpair_heatmaps_univariate}
make_wp_heatmap <- function(df, disease_list = NULL) {
  if (nrow(df) == 0) return(NULL)
  
  # Use provided disease list or fall back to global diseases
  diseases_to_use <- if (!is.null(disease_list)) disease_list else diseases
  
  # Panel-style control variables
  text_size_pt <- HEATMAP_TEXT_SIZE
  square_size <- text_size_pt / HEATMAP_SQUARE_SIZE_DIVISOR
  
  # Prepare data with display names
  df_plot <- df |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      Disease_Display = dplyr::case_when(
        Disease %in% names(diseases_to_use) ~ purrr::map_chr(Disease, ~ diseases_to_use[[.x]]$name),
        TRUE ~ stringr::str_to_title(stringr::str_replace_all(Disease, "_", " "))
      ),
      Organ_Display = dplyr::case_when(
        Organ == "Gastrointestinal_tract" ~ "Gastrointestinal",
        Organ == "Kidney_urinary" ~ "Kidney and Bladder",
        TRUE ~ stringr::str_to_title(Organ)
      ),
      # Create effect size for coloring (use HR directly, consistent with regular heatmaps)
      effect_size = HR,
      significance = dplyr::case_when(
        P_value_FDR < 0.001 ~ "***",
        P_value_FDR < 0.01 ~ "**",
        P_value_FDR < 0.05 ~ "*",
        TRUE ~ ""
      ),
      effect_size_colored = dplyr::if_else(significance != "", effect_size, NA_real_),
      non_sig_marker = dplyr::if_else(significance == "", "×", "")
    )
  
  # Get available diseases and organs from data
  available_diseases <- unique(df_plot$Disease_Display) |> na.omit()
  available_organs <- unique(df_plot$Organ_Display) |> na.omit()
  
  # Get standardized orders and filter to available items
  disease_order <- create_standardized_disease_order(diseases_to_use)
  disease_order <- intersect(disease_order, available_diseases)
  
  organ_order <- standardized_organ_order
  organ_order <- intersect(organ_order, available_organs)
  # Add any organs not in standardized order at the end
  missing_organs <- setdiff(available_organs, standardized_organ_order)
  organ_order <- c(organ_order, missing_organs)
  
  if (length(disease_order) == 0 || length(organ_order) == 0) return(NULL)
  
  # Now apply ordering and calculate numeric positions
  df_plot <- df_plot |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      Disease_Display = factor(Disease_Display, levels = disease_order),
      Organ_Display = factor(Organ_Display, levels = organ_order),
      Disease_num = (as.numeric(Disease_Display) - 1) * square_size + square_size/2,
      Organ_num = (as.numeric(Organ_Display) - 1) * square_size + square_size/2
    )
  
  # Calculate dynamic range (white-to-red only, no negative values)
  effect_range <- range(log(df_plot$HR), na.rm = TRUE)
  buffer <- 0.1
  max_limit <- max(1.5, effect_range[2] + buffer)
  min_limit <- 0  # Start from 0 since no negative values
  
  breaks <- seq(0, max_limit, length.out = 4)
  labels <- sprintf("%.1f", breaks)
  
  ggplot2::ggplot(df_plot, ggplot2::aes(x = Organ_num, y = Disease_num, fill = log(effect_size_colored))) +
    ggplot2::geom_tile(width = square_size, height = square_size, color = NA) +
    ggplot2::geom_text(ggplot2::aes(x = Organ_num, y = Disease_num, label = non_sig_marker), size = 5.5, color = "darkgrey", family = "Helvetica", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
    ggplot2::scale_fill_gradientn(
      colors = c(
        "white",        # Start at 0
        "#C64D4D",      # Red (mid-high)
        "#B71C1C"       # Darker red (extreme high)
      ),
      values = scales::rescale(c(0, max_limit * 0.5, max_limit)),
      limits = c(0, max_limit),
      na.value = "white",
      name = "log(Hazard\nRatio)",
      breaks = breaks,
      labels = labels
    ) +
    ggplot2::scale_x_continuous(
      breaks = (seq_along(organ_order) - 1) * square_size + square_size/2,
      labels = organ_order,
      expand = c(0, 0),
      limits = c(0, length(organ_order) * square_size)
    ) +
    ggplot2::scale_y_continuous(
      breaks = (seq_along(disease_order) - 1) * square_size + square_size/2,
      labels = disease_order,
      expand = c(0, 0),
      limits = c(0, length(disease_order) * square_size)
    ) +
    ggplot2::labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
    ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_family = "Helvetica") +
    ggplot2::theme(
      text = ggplot2::element_text(family = "Helvetica", color = "black"),
      axis.text.x = ggplot2::element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = HEATMAP_TEXT_SIZE, color = "black", family = "Helvetica"),
      axis.text.y = ggplot2::element_text(size = HEATMAP_TEXT_SIZE, hjust = 0, margin = ggplot2::margin(r = 10), color = "black", family = "Helvetica"),
      axis.title = ggplot2::element_blank(),
      axis.ticks = ggplot2::element_blank(),
      legend.position = "right",
      legend.title = ggplot2::element_text(size = 11, color = "black", family = "Helvetica"),
      legend.text = ggplot2::element_text(size = 9, color = "black", family = "Helvetica"),
      legend.key.height = ggplot2::unit(0.8, "cm"),
      legend.key.width = ggplot2::unit(0.5, "cm"),
      panel.grid = ggplot2::element_blank(),
      panel.spacing = ggplot2::unit(0, "lines"),
      panel.border = ggplot2::element_blank(),
      plot.margin = ggplot2::margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm")
    ) +
    ggplot2::coord_fixed(ratio = 1, expand = FALSE)
}

dir.create(file.path(output_core_dir, "heatmap", "within_pair"), showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

if (exists("wp_uni_all") && nrow(wp_uni_all) > 0) {
  p_all <- make_wp_heatmap(wp_uni_all, diseases_with_mortality_healthspan)
  if (!is.null(p_all)) {
    ggplot2::ggsave(filename = "all_pairs.svg", plot = p_all, path = file.path(output_core_dir, "heatmap", "within_pair"), device = "svg", width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)
    ggplot2::ggsave(filename = "all_pairs.png", plot = p_all, path = file.path(output_core_dir, "heatmap", "within_pair"), device = "png", width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)
  }
}
if (exists("wp_uni_mz") && nrow(wp_uni_mz) > 0) {
  p_mz <- make_wp_heatmap(wp_uni_mz, diseases_with_mortality_healthspan)
  if (!is.null(p_mz)) {
    ggplot2::ggsave(filename = "mz_twins.svg", plot = p_mz, path = file.path(output_core_dir, "heatmap", "within_pair"), device = "svg", width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)
    ggplot2::ggsave(filename = "mz_twins.png", plot = p_mz, path = file.path(output_core_dir, "heatmap", "within_pair"), device = "png", width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)
  }
}
if (exists("wp_uni_dz") && nrow(wp_uni_dz) > 0) {
  p_dz <- make_wp_heatmap(wp_uni_dz, diseases_with_mortality_healthspan)
  if (!is.null(p_dz)) {
    ggplot2::ggsave(filename = "dz_twins.svg", plot = p_dz, path = file.path(output_core_dir, "heatmap", "within_pair"), device = "svg", width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)
    ggplot2::ggsave(filename = "dz_twins.png", plot = p_dz, path = file.path(output_core_dir, "heatmap", "within_pair"), device = "png", width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)
  }
}

# Significant-only within-pair heatmaps (filter out outcomes with no significant associations)
if (exists("wp_uni_all") && nrow(wp_uni_all) > 0) {
  # Find outcomes that have at least one significant association
  outcomes_with_sig <- wp_uni_all |>
    dplyr::filter(P_value_FDR < 0.05) |>
    dplyr::distinct(Disease) |>
    dplyr::pull(Disease)
  
  # Filter to only include outcomes that have significant associations
  wp_uni_all_sig <- wp_uni_all |>
    dplyr::filter(Disease %in% outcomes_with_sig)
  
  if (nrow(wp_uni_all_sig) > 0) {
    p_all_sig <- make_wp_heatmap(wp_uni_all_sig, diseases_with_mortality_healthspan)
    if (!is.null(p_all_sig)) {
      ggplot2::ggsave(filename = "all_pairs_significant_only.svg", plot = p_all_sig, path = file.path(output_core_dir, "heatmap", "within_pair"), device = "svg", width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)
      ggplot2::ggsave(filename = "all_pairs_significant_only.png", plot = p_all_sig, path = file.path(output_core_dir, "heatmap", "within_pair"), device = "png", width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)
    }
  }
}
if (exists("wp_uni_mz") && nrow(wp_uni_mz) > 0) {
  outcomes_with_sig <- wp_uni_mz |>
    dplyr::filter(P_value_FDR < 0.05) |>
    dplyr::distinct(Disease) |>
    dplyr::pull(Disease)
  
  wp_uni_mz_sig <- wp_uni_mz |>
    dplyr::filter(Disease %in% outcomes_with_sig)
  
  if (nrow(wp_uni_mz_sig) > 0) {
    p_mz_sig <- make_wp_heatmap(wp_uni_mz_sig, diseases_with_mortality_healthspan)
    if (!is.null(p_mz_sig)) {
      ggplot2::ggsave(filename = "mz_twins_significant_only.svg", plot = p_mz_sig, path = file.path(output_core_dir, "heatmap", "within_pair"), device = "svg", width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)
      ggplot2::ggsave(filename = "mz_twins_significant_only.png", plot = p_mz_sig, path = file.path(output_core_dir, "heatmap", "within_pair"), device = "png", width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)
    }
  }
}
if (exists("wp_uni_dz") && nrow(wp_uni_dz) > 0) {
  outcomes_with_sig <- wp_uni_dz |>
    dplyr::filter(P_value_FDR < 0.05) |>
    dplyr::distinct(Disease) |>
    dplyr::pull(Disease)
  
  wp_uni_dz_sig <- wp_uni_dz |>
    dplyr::filter(Disease %in% outcomes_with_sig)
  
  if (nrow(wp_uni_dz_sig) > 0) {
    p_dz_sig <- make_wp_heatmap(wp_uni_dz_sig, diseases_with_mortality_healthspan)
    if (!is.null(p_dz_sig)) {
      ggplot2::ggsave(filename = "dz_twins_significant_only.svg", plot = p_dz_sig, path = file.path(output_core_dir, "heatmap", "within_pair"), device = "svg", width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)
      ggplot2::ggsave(filename = "dz_twins_significant_only.png", plot = p_dz_sig, path = file.path(output_core_dir, "heatmap", "within_pair"), device = "png", width = 10, height = 8, dpi = 300)
    }
  }
}

```

## Panel Heatmaps: Significant Diseases Only

```{r panel_heatmap_functions_cox}
# Control variables for heatmap appearance
HEATMAP_TEXT_SIZE <- 10
HEATMAP_SQUARE_SIZE_DIVISOR <- 10

create_panel_cox_heatmap <- function(data, model_type) {
  model_data <- data |> filter(Model_Type == model_type)
  if (nrow(model_data) == 0) return(NULL)
  
  available_organs <- unique(model_data$Organ_Display) |> na.omit()
  organ_order <- c(intersect(standardized_organ_order, available_organs), setdiff(available_organs, standardized_organ_order))
  
  available_diseases <- unique(model_data$Disease_Display)
  disease_order <- create_standardized_disease_order(diseases)
  disease_order <- intersect(disease_order, available_diseases)
  
  if (length(disease_order) == 0 || length(organ_order) == 0) return(NULL)
  
  text_size_pt <- HEATMAP_TEXT_SIZE
  square_size <- text_size_pt / HEATMAP_SQUARE_SIZE_DIVISOR
  
  model_data_plot <- model_data |>
    mutate(
      Disease_Display = factor(Disease_Display, levels = disease_order),
      Organ_Display = factor(Organ_Display, levels = organ_order),
      Disease_num = (as.numeric(Disease_Display) - 1) * square_size + square_size/2,
      Organ_num = (as.numeric(Organ_Display) - 1) * square_size + square_size/2,
      effect_size_colored = if_else(impossible, NA_real_, if_else(significance != "", log(HR), NA_real_)),
      non_sig_marker = if_else(impossible, "", if_else(significance == "", "×", ""))
    )
  
  effect_range <- range(log(model_data$HR), na.rm = TRUE)
  buffer <- 0.1
  max_limit <- max(1.5, effect_range[2] + buffer)
  min_limit <- 0  # Start from 0 since no negative values
  
  breaks <- seq(0, max_limit, length.out = 4)
  labels <- sprintf("%.1f", breaks)
  
  max_y <- length(disease_order) * square_size
  max_x <- length(organ_order) * square_size
  
  ggplot(model_data_plot, aes(x = Organ_num, y = Disease_num, fill = effect_size_colored)) +
    geom_tile(width = square_size, height = square_size, color = NA) +
    geom_tile(data = model_data_plot |> filter(impossible), fill = "grey80", alpha = 0.7, width = square_size, height = square_size, color = NA) +
    geom_segment(
      data = model_data_plot |> filter(impossible),
      aes(x = Organ_num - square_size/2, y = Disease_num - square_size/2,
          xend = Organ_num + square_size/2, yend = Disease_num + square_size/2),
      color = "white", linewidth = 0.8
    ) +
    geom_text(aes(x = Organ_num, y = Disease_num, label = non_sig_marker), size = 3.5, color = "darkgrey", inherit.aes = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_gradientn(
      colors = c(
        "white",        # Start at 0
        "#C64D4D",      # Red (mid-high)
        "#B71C1C"       # Slightly darker red (extreme high)
      ),
      values = scales::rescale(c(0, max_limit * 0.5, max_limit)),
      limits = c(0, max_limit),
      na.value = "white",
      name = "log(Hazard\nRatio)",
      breaks = breaks,
      labels = labels
    ) +
    scale_x_continuous(
      breaks = (seq_along(organ_order) - 1) * square_size + square_size/2,
      labels = organ_order,
      expand = c(0, 0),
      limits = c(0, length(organ_order) * square_size)
    ) +
    scale_y_continuous(
      breaks = (seq_along(disease_order) - 1) * square_size + square_size/2,
      labels = disease_order,
      expand = c(0, 0),
      limits = c(0, length(disease_order) * square_size)
    ) +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = HEATMAP_TEXT_SIZE, color = "black"),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = HEATMAP_TEXT_SIZE, hjust = 0, margin = margin(r = 10), color = "black"),
      axis.title = element_blank(),
      axis.ticks = element_blank(),
      legend.position = "right",
      legend.title = element_text(size = 9),
      legend.text = element_text(size = 7),
      legend.key.height = unit(0.6, "cm"),
      legend.key.width = unit(0.4, "cm"),
      panel.grid = element_blank(),
      panel.spacing = unit(0, "lines"),
      panel.border = element_blank(),
      plot.margin = margin(0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, "cm")
    ) +
    coord_fixed(ratio = 1, expand = FALSE)
}

filter_significant_diseases_cox <- function(heatmap_data) {
  significant_diseases <- heatmap_data |>
    filter(significance != "", !impossible) |>
    distinct(Disease_Display) |>
    pull(Disease_Display)
  
  heatmap_data |>
    filter(Disease_Display %in% significant_diseases)
}
```

```{r create_cohort_panel_heatmap}
# Filter cohort level results for significant diseases only
# Version WITHOUT Mortality: Exclude Mortality and Healthspan (shown separately as KM curves)
cohort_sig_data_no_mort <- heatmap_data |>
  filter(Model_Type == "Mortality") |>
  filter(Disease != "Mortality", Disease != "Healthspan") |>
  filter_significant_diseases_cox()

if (nrow(cohort_sig_data_no_mort) > 0) {
  cohort_panel_heatmap_no_mort <- create_panel_cox_heatmap(cohort_sig_data_no_mort, "Mortality")
  
  if (!is.null(cohort_panel_heatmap_no_mort)) {
    print(cohort_panel_heatmap_no_mort)
    
    panel_dir <- file.path(output_core_dir, "heatmap", "panel")
    dir.create(panel_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
    
    # Calculate proportional height based on number of rows
    # WP sig only has 6 rows with height = 3, so height per row = 0.5
    # Cohort sig only should scale proportionally
    cohort_n_rows <- length(unique(cohort_sig_data_no_mort$Disease_Display))
    wp_n_rows <- 6  # Reference: WP sig only has 6 rows
    wp_height <- 3  # Reference height for WP
    height_per_row <- wp_height / wp_n_rows
    cohort_height <- cohort_n_rows * height_per_row
    
    ggsave(
      filename = file.path(panel_dir, "cohort_significant_diseases.pdf"),
      plot = cohort_panel_heatmap_no_mort,
      width = 7,
      height = cohort_height,
      dpi = 300,
      device = "pdf"
    )
    ggsave(
      filename = file.path(panel_dir, "cohort_significant_diseases.svg"),
      plot = cohort_panel_heatmap_no_mort,
      width = 7,
      height = cohort_height,
      dpi = 300,
      device = "svg"
    )
    ggsave(
      filename = file.path(panel_dir, "cohort_significant_diseases.png"),
      plot = cohort_panel_heatmap_no_mort,
      width = 7,
      height = cohort_height,
      dpi = 300,
      device = "png"
    )
    
    cat(paste("Cohort panel heatmap (without mortality) saved (", cohort_n_rows, "rows, height =", round(cohort_height, 2), ")\n", sep = ""))
  }
  
  # Get list of significant diseases from cohort level (without mortality)
  sig_diseases_cohort <- unique(cohort_sig_data_no_mort$Disease_Display)
} else {
  sig_diseases_cohort <- character(0)
}

# Version WITH Mortality: Exclude only Healthspan (shown separately as KM curves)
cohort_sig_data_with_mort <- heatmap_data |>
  filter(Model_Type == "Mortality") |>
  filter(Disease != "Healthspan") |>
  filter_significant_diseases_cox()

if (nrow(cohort_sig_data_with_mort) > 0) {
  cohort_panel_heatmap_with_mort <- create_panel_cox_heatmap(cohort_sig_data_with_mort, "Mortality")
  
  if (!is.null(cohort_panel_heatmap_with_mort)) {
    print(cohort_panel_heatmap_with_mort)
    
    panel_dir <- file.path(output_core_dir, "heatmap", "panel")
    dir.create(panel_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
    
    # Calculate proportional height based on number of rows
    cohort_n_rows_mort <- length(unique(cohort_sig_data_with_mort$Disease_Display))
    wp_n_rows <- 6  # Reference: WP sig only has 6 rows
    wp_height <- 3  # Reference height for WP
    height_per_row <- wp_height / wp_n_rows
    cohort_height_mort <- cohort_n_rows_mort * height_per_row
    
    ggsave(
      filename = file.path(panel_dir, "cohort_significant_diseases_with_mortality.pdf"),
      plot = cohort_panel_heatmap_with_mort,
      width = 7,
      height = cohort_height_mort,
      dpi = 300,
      device = "pdf"
    )
    ggsave(
      filename = file.path(panel_dir, "cohort_significant_diseases_with_mortality.svg"),
      plot = cohort_panel_heatmap_with_mort,
      width = 7,
      height = cohort_height_mort,
      dpi = 300,
      device = "svg"
    )
    ggsave(
      filename = file.path(panel_dir, "cohort_significant_diseases_with_mortality.png"),
      plot = cohort_panel_heatmap_with_mort,
      width = 7,
      height = cohort_height_mort,
      dpi = 300,
      device = "png"
    )
    
    cat(paste("Cohort panel heatmap (with mortality) saved (", cohort_n_rows_mort, "rows, height =", round(cohort_height_mort, 2), ")\n", sep = ""))
  }
  
  # Get list of significant diseases from cohort level (with mortality)
  sig_diseases_cohort_with_mort <- unique(cohort_sig_data_with_mort$Disease_Display)
} else {
  sig_diseases_cohort_with_mort <- character(0)
}
```

```{r create_withinpair_panel_heatmap}
# Create within-pair heatmap using same diseases as cohort level
if (exists("wp_uni_all") && nrow(wp_uni_all) > 0 && length(sig_diseases_cohort) > 0) {
  # Prepare within-pair data similar to heatmap_data structure
  wp_heatmap_data <- wp_uni_all |>
    mutate(
      Disease_Display = case_when(
        Disease == "Mortality" ~ "Mortality",
        Disease == "Healthspan" ~ "End of Healthspan",
        Disease %in% names(diseases_with_mortality_healthspan) ~ map_chr(Disease, ~ diseases_with_mortality_healthspan[[.x]]$name),
        Disease %in% names(diseases) ~ disease_names_lookup[Disease],
        TRUE ~ str_to_title(str_replace_all(Disease, "_", " "))
      ),
      Organ_Display = case_when(
        Organ == "Gastrointestinal_tract" ~ "Gastrointestinal",
        Organ == "Kidney_urinary" ~ "Kidney and Bladder",
        TRUE ~ str_to_title(Organ)
      ),
      significance = case_when(
        P_value_FDR < 0.001 ~ "***",
        P_value_FDR < 0.01 ~ "**",
        P_value_FDR < 0.05 ~ "*",
        TRUE ~ ""
      ),
      HR = HR,
      non_sig_marker = if_else(significance == "", "×", ""),
      impossible = case_when(
        Disease %in% c("ovarian_cancer", "uterine_cancer", "breast_cancer") & Organ == "Prostate" ~ TRUE,
        Disease == "prostate_cancer" & Organ == "Ovary" ~ TRUE,
        TRUE ~ FALSE
      ),
      Model_Type = "WithinPair_All"
    ) |>
    filter(Disease_Display %in% sig_diseases_cohort) |>
    filter(Disease != "Mortality", Disease != "Healthspan")
  
  if (nrow(wp_heatmap_data) > 0) {
    wp_panel_heatmap <- create_panel_cox_heatmap(wp_heatmap_data, "WithinPair_All")
    
    if (!is.null(wp_panel_heatmap)) {
      print(wp_panel_heatmap)
      
      panel_dir <- file.path(output_core_dir, "heatmap", "panel")
      dir.create(panel_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
      
      ggsave(
        filename = file.path(panel_dir, "withinpair_significant_diseases.pdf"),
        plot = wp_panel_heatmap,
        width = 7,
        height = 3,
        dpi = 300,
        device = "pdf"
      )
      ggsave(
        filename = file.path(panel_dir, "withinpair_significant_diseases.svg"),
        plot = wp_panel_heatmap,
        width = 7,
        height = 3,
        dpi = 300,
        device = "svg"
      )
      ggsave(
        filename = file.path(panel_dir, "withinpair_significant_diseases.png"),
        plot = wp_panel_heatmap,
        width = 7,
        height = 3,
        dpi = 300,
        device = "png"
      )
      
      cat("Within-pair panel heatmap saved\n")
    }
  }
}
```


## Within-Pair Significant Only Heatmap

```{r create_withinpair_sig_only_heatmap}
# Filter within-pair results for WP-significant diseases only
# This shows only diseases that have at least one WP-significant association
if (exists("wp_uni_all") && nrow(wp_uni_all) > 0) {
  # Prepare WP data similar to heatmap_data structure
  wp_all_data <- wp_uni_all |>
    mutate(
      Disease_Display = case_when(
        Disease == "Mortality" ~ "Mortality",
        Disease == "Healthspan" ~ "End of Healthspan",
        Disease %in% names(diseases_with_mortality_healthspan) ~ map_chr(Disease, ~ diseases_with_mortality_healthspan[[.x]]$name),
        Disease %in% names(diseases) ~ disease_names_lookup[Disease],
        TRUE ~ str_to_title(str_replace_all(Disease, "_", " "))
      ),
      Organ_Display = case_when(
        Organ == "Gastrointestinal_tract" ~ "Gastrointestinal",
        Organ == "Kidney_urinary" ~ "Kidney and Bladder",
        TRUE ~ str_to_title(Organ)
      ),
      significance = case_when(
        P_value_FDR < 0.001 ~ "***",
        P_value_FDR < 0.01 ~ "**",
        P_value_FDR < 0.05 ~ "*",
        TRUE ~ ""
      ),
      HR = HR,
      non_sig_marker = if_else(significance == "", "×", ""),
      impossible = case_when(
        Disease %in% c("ovarian_cancer", "uterine_cancer", "breast_cancer") & Organ == "Prostate" ~ TRUE,
        Disease == "prostate_cancer" & Organ == "Ovary" ~ TRUE,
        TRUE ~ FALSE
      ),
      Model_Type = "WithinPair_All"
    )
  
  # Filter for WP-significant diseases (diseases with at least one WP-significant association)
  wp_sig_diseases <- wp_all_data |>
    filter(significance != "", !impossible) |>
    distinct(Disease_Display) |>
    pull(Disease_Display)
  
  wp_sig_only_data <- wp_all_data |>
    filter(Disease_Display %in% wp_sig_diseases) |>
    filter(tolower(Disease) != "mortality", tolower(Disease) != "healthspan")
  
  if (nrow(wp_sig_only_data) > 0) {
    wp_sig_only_heatmap <- create_panel_cox_heatmap(wp_sig_only_data, "WithinPair_All")
    
    if (!is.null(wp_sig_only_heatmap)) {
      print(wp_sig_only_heatmap)
      
      panel_dir <- file.path(output_core_dir, "heatmap", "panel")
      dir.create(panel_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
      
      ggsave(
        filename = file.path(panel_dir, "withinpair_significant_only.pdf"),
        plot = wp_sig_only_heatmap,
        width = 7,
        height = 3,
        dpi = 300,
        device = "pdf"
      )
      ggsave(
        filename = file.path(panel_dir, "withinpair_significant_only.svg"),
        plot = wp_sig_only_heatmap,
        width = 7,
        height = 3,
        dpi = 300,
        device = "svg"
      )
      ggsave(
        filename = file.path(panel_dir, "withinpair_significant_only.png"),
        plot = wp_sig_only_heatmap,
        width = 7,
        height = 3,
        dpi = 300,
        device = "png"
      )
      
      cat("Within-pair significant only heatmap saved\n")
    }
  } else {
    cat("No WP-significant diseases found\n")
  }
} else {
  cat("WP data not available\n")
}
```
